title: Change the colour of your vehicle
description: Tell the Barbados Licensing Authority before you change the colour of your vehicle.
summary: Your registration record includes the colour of your vehicle. If you respray it or wrap it in a different colour, you must tell the Barbados Licensing Authority so the record matches the vehicle.
This is a short form. You confirm who you are, the registration number, the current colour and the new colour. The Licensing Authority updates the record and approves the change.

It matters because traffic enforcement and the police rely on the registration record. If your vehicle is stopped or stolen, the colour on file needs to match what the vehicle actually looks like now.

items: the registration number of the vehicle
the current colour and the new colour
the date you plan to make the change

how_long: Approval is given the same day.

options.heading: In person
content: Take the completed Request to Change the Colour of Vehicle form to the Barbados Licensing Authority.

contact.address:
The Pine, East–West Boulevard
St. Michael
BB11000

assumptions: ‘Approval given the same day’ is based on common BLA practice. The form does not state a processing time.
‘There is no fee’ is inferred – the form does not state a fee.
